suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that frontend-handoff updates are required only when externally visible API contracts/behaviors change, and internal-only refactors may skip with explicit rationale.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for centralize-manual-journals-through-facade found no endpoint or request/response contract changes, yet the worker had to record a skill deviation for skipping frontend handoff documentation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document AccountingFacade.createManualJournal/createManualJournalEntry as the canonical manual journal path and note AccountingCoreEngineCore manual creation as legacy defensive fallback only.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review confirmed canonical routing via AccountingController -> AccountingService -> AccountingFacade while AccountingCoreEngineCore still retains fallback createManualJournal implementation.
